steps.title: Identify the clue about the nose
steps.content: The passage calls the nose delicate and says it sticks out, making it especially easy to break.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
The blank needs to mean "easily broken" — the next sentence explains the nose is delicate, protrudes, and is "especially easy to break." Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — recognizable: easy to identify — describes visibility, not breakability; unrelated to why noses are missing. ✗
  • Choice B — fragile: easily damaged or broken — directly matches "delicate" and "especially easy to break." ✓
  • Choice C — common: ordinary or widespread — the passage explains why noses break off, not that they are unremarkable features. ✗
  • Choice D — sophisticated: complex or refined — implies advanced craftsmanship, the opposite of a weak point. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
